title: Hello December
excerpt: Not sure quite how we got to December already - the last 11 months sure have flown by. Last night before going to a friend's birthday party, I decided I was definitely going to do December Daily this year. I…
body:
Not sure quite how we got to December already - the last 11 months sure have flown by. Last night before going to a friend's birthday party, I decided I was definitely going to do December Daily this year. I started by painting the cover with white paint, then I embellished it using mostly Studio Calico's kit, but also throwing in Kelly Purkey washi tapes and a custom Kal Barteski design. Then after returning from the party around 11pm (way past my bedtime), I added the finishing touches and was in bed by midnight. I plan on sharing pages as I get them done, with no real plan other than to have it finished by the end of this year. Keeping it simple, printing out photos and carving out time each day to get this done will be a welcome challenge that will no doubt be worthwhile to look back on someday. It is after all, my first time having a real Christmas tree, Jack's first Christmas, and our first Christmas in our own home as a family. Bring it. **To help celebrate the start of a very special month, we are doing a promotion and giveaway with one of our creative partners**

Pinkfresh Studio is a fresh online shop that offers their own exclusive range of washi tapes, trendy shaped enamel stickers - these are my favorite, brad stickers and fresh press cards in fun colors. They have recently started selling Ombre print washi tapes which are really different and so vibrant. The airmail and aztec prints look so gorgeous. And last but not least their 1st ever stamp set called “Delightful Tales” is great for all your layouts, PL pages and cards. Their products are really fun and colorful to add a little something extra to any paper crafting projects. Make sure to like their Facebook page and connect with their blog to stay tuned for their next release of beautiful color blocked wood veneers.

Pinkfresh Studio Shop | Blog | Instagram | Facebook

Promotion: Take 30% off your entire order using code ‘AMY30OFF’ from 12/1 12:00 AM to 12/3 12:00 PM CST... this is a special offer just for 2 days and there after the code will be good for 15% off your entire order til 12/5 12:00 PM CST

GIVEAWAY IS CLOSED, but you can still enjoy the Promotion mentioned above. 2 people will get $25.00 worth of goodies of their choice. Simply leave a comment with your favorite word/words to describe December. Giveaway closes 12/3 at 7am CST and winners will be announced & notified shortly after. GOOD LUCK! The winners are #37 and #106 - Sierra says: December 1, 2013 at 2:35 pm & Jessica Yoder-Jones says: December 2, 2013 at 6:44 am
